headline: As Banks Benefit From the IPO Boom, Blackstone (BX) Bets on Wealthy Individuals Ahead of Q2 Earnings
summary: Wall Street banks are having their best run in over a decade, while Blackstone Inc. (NYSE:BX), heading into its second-quarter earnings today, has missed nearly all of it. Banks Pull Ahead of Private Capital Shares of the largest U.S. private capital groups have slumped more than 15% this year and over 20% in the past […]

headline: The Bull Case For Goldman Sachs Group (GS) Could Change Following Record Q2 Earnings And Bigger Buybacks
summary: Earlier in July 2026, Goldman Sachs reported strong second-quarter results, with net income rising to US$6.63 billion and earnings per share roughly doubling year-on-year. Alongside these results, Goldman Sachs intensified capital return and funding actions, including billions in new bond and preferred issuances plus continued buybacks and a higher quarterly dividend. We’ll now examine how this combination of record earnings and increased capital returns might influence Goldman Sachs’...
